name: Masterworks 8: Steinway Spirio featuring "George Gershwin"
description: ★ Rating: 8/10 🎭 Artistic Merit This Masterworks bill delivers crisp American vigor: Gould's American Salute kicks off with snappy marches quoting "When Johnny Comes Marching Home," its brass punches landing like fireworks. Gershwin's Piano Concerto in F, via…
